name: claim_verifier_benchmark
description: Broader benchmark for claim verification. These cases are still lightweight enough for a live grading session, but stricter than the smoke dataset and cover supported, nuanced, and contradicting claims.

cases.claim: Caffeine worsens sleep quality in adults.
cases.notes: Literature-rich sleep topic; tests whether the system can retrieve strong review-level evidence.

cases.claim: Mindfulness-based cognitive therapy improves obsessive-compulsive disorder symptoms.
cases.notes: Intervention-driven psychiatric claim with direct trial evidence available.

cases.claim: Exercise is an effective treatment for depression.
cases.notes: High-volume evidence area with systematic reviews and meta-analyses.

cases.claim: Polyunsaturated fatty acid supplementation improves ADHD core symptoms in children and adolescents.
cases.notes: Negative-control style case: the key review in cache reports no clear benefit on ADHD core symptoms.
